content: Octowiki and a behaviour tree implementation already exist in the shoemakers repo (../shoemakers or ../shoe-makers). The intentional project builds on these existing components. The shoemakers behaviour tree has inbox handling wired up, but treats inbox messages as instructions to act on and delete — not as conversational signal to triage and distil.

provenance.raw_agent: The behaviour tree is fully implemented — src/tree/default-tree.ts has [inbox messages?] → inbox already wired up. The inbox currently lives at .shoe-makers/inbox/ and counts .md files (flat, no pending/done).
provenance.raw_user: we have octowiki and we have a model for behaviour tree in my repo ../shoemakers (maybe hyphenated)
